project.title: The Bank Laughed at His Locker — Then He Pulled Out a 1971 Paper
project.description: A story about Harold Garrett, a 71-year-old Tennessee farmer who quietly paid for a safe deposit locker for 53 years, revealing a legacy of his father's wisdom that protected his family's land from bank acquisition.

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 35mm film look, natural skin texture, soft depth of field, clean frame free of watermarks, logos, or AI icons
flashback_style: soft warm vignette, slightly faded colors, dreamy atmosphere

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera, clean frame free of watermarks, logos, or AI icons

era.name: 1970s-2020s rural Tennessee
era.keywords: rural Tennessee countryside, weathered clapboard farmhouses, gravel country roads, old pickup trucks, wooden fences, dirt roads, manual rotary telephones, paper ledgers
era.wardrobe: worn workwear, plaid flannel shirts, faded denim jeans, work boots, canvas jackets, suspenders, simple cotton jackets, button-down shirts, suits and ties for bank staff

characters.name: Harold Garrett
characters.description: 71-year-old man, weathered Tennessee farmer with deep-set wise brown eyes showing decades of quiet strength and patience, weathered face with gentle smile lines around eyes and mouth, kind but firm jawline with subtle cleft chin, gray thinning hair receding at temples, suspenders over worn cotton jacket, weathered calloused hands

characters.name: Carter Blake
characters.description: 34-year-old man, bank branch manager with cold calculating pale blue eyes showing arrogant entitlement and condescension, sharp arrogant jawline with subtle sneer, perfectly groomed with gel-styled dark hair, wearing tailored navy suit and crisp tie, manicured hands revealing privileged upbringing

characters.name: George Garrett (Flashback)
characters.description: middle-aged man in his 40s, 1970s Tennessee farmer with thoughtful concerned hazel eyes showing lines of worry around forehead, kind but firm expression, short graying brown hair, wearing simple plaid flannel shirt and worn denim overalls, weathered hands from farm work

characters.name: David Garrett
characters.description: 44-year-old man, Harold's son, mechanic with quiet observant brown eyes like his father, kind youthful face with subtle resemblance to Harold, short dark hair, wearing mechanic blue work shirt and faded denim jeans, work-worn hands

characters.name: Frank Solis
characters.description: 60-year-old man, property lawyer with calm intelligent brown eyes behind wire-rimmed glasses showing decades of legal wisdom, reassuring face with white hair at temples, professional demeanor, wearing dark charcoal suit and tie

characters.name: Judge Margaret Chan
characters.description: middle-aged woman, federal judge with sharp intelligent dark eyes scanning everything with impartial authority, stern but fair expression showing decades on the bench, black hair pulled back in professional style, wearing black judicial robe

settings.name: First Valley Bank Lobby
settings.keywords: modern bank lobby, large teller counter, marble floors, floor-to-ceiling windows, corporate atmosphere

settings.name: Bank Vault Room
settings.keywords: small steel vault room, rows of lockers from floor to ceiling, cold metallic atmosphere, steel walls

settings.name: Harold's Farm
settings.keywords: rural Tennessee farmland, 160 acres of fields, old wooden fencing, dirt roads

settings.name: Harold's Farmhouse
settings.keywords: weathered clapboard farmhouse, simple rural home, wooden porch, kitchen window looking over fields

settings.name: North Field with Oak Tree
settings.keywords: open field near sunset, large old oak tree, simple stone grave marker, wooden fence line

settings.name: Federal Courtroom
settings.keywords: wood-paneled courtroom walls, faded flag in corner, judge's bench, wooden pews

mood_map.nostalgic: soft golden light, warm palette, slight gaussian blur
mood_map.tense: cool blue-gray tones, hard shadows, tight framing
mood_map.hopeful: morning light, open composition, warm highlights
mood_map.shock: dramatic side lighting, shallow DOF, extreme close-up
mood_map.calm: even soft lighting, neutral tones, balanced composition
mood_map.sad: muted desaturated palette, overcast lighting, empty space
mood_map.determined: strong directional light, firm posture, clear focus
